languages.text: {n}Лица собравшихся светлеют: кто-то начинает исступленно молиться, кто-то — выкрикивать благодарности. Одноглазый утирает нос, а однорукий складывает руки аквилой:{/n} "Да здравствует Вольный Торговец {name} фон Валанциус!" {n}Радостный крик тут же подхватывают десятки глоток.{/n}

{n}The faces of the crowd brighten: some begin to pray fervently, others to shout out their thanks. The one-eyed man wipes his nose, and the one-armed man makes the sign of the Aquila.{/n} "Long live Rogue Trader {name} von Valancius!" {n}The joyous cry is immediately echoed by dozens more voices.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Лица собравшихся светлеют: кто-то начинает исступленно молиться, кто-то — выкрикивать благодарности. Одноглазый утирает нос, а однорукий складывает руки аквилой:{/n} "Да здравствует Вольный Торговец {name} фон Валанциус!" {n}Радостный крик тут же подхватывают десятки глоток.{/n}

The one-eyed man wipes his nose, and the one-armed man makes the sign of the Aquila.{/n} "Long live Rogue Trader {name} von Valancius!" {n}The joyous cry is immediately echoed by dozens more voices.{/n}

languages.text: {n}群衆の顔は明るくなった。中には熱心に祈る者もいれば、感謝の言葉を叫ぶ者もいる。片目の男は鼻を拭き、片腕の男はアグリラの印を結ぶ。{/n}「ローグトレーダー{name}・フォン・ヴァランキウス万歳！」{n}歓喜の叫びはすぐに数十人の声に反響する。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The faces of the crowd brighten: some begin to pray fervently, others to shout out their thanks. The one-eyed man wipes his nose, and the one-armed man makes the sign of the Aquila.{/n} "Long live Rogue Trader {name} von Valancius!" {n}The joyous cry is immediately echoed by dozens more voices.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}群衆の顔は明るくなった。中には熱心に祈る者もいれば、感謝の言葉を叫ぶ者もいる。片目の男は鼻を拭き、片腕の男はアグリラの印を結ぶ。{n}「ローグトレーダー{name}・フォン・ヴァランキウス万歳！」{n}歓喜の叫びはすぐに数十人の声に反響する。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Kalabalığın yüzleri aydınlanıyor. Bazıları hararetle dua etmeye, diğerleri teşekkürlerini haykırmaya başlıyor. Tek gözlü adam burnunu siliyor, tek kollu adam da Çift Başlı Kartal işareti yapıyor.{/n} "Çok yaşa Hür Tacir {name} von Valancius!" {n}Neşeli çığlık, hemen onlarca ses tarafından yankılanıyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The faces of the crowd brighten: some begin to pray fervently, others to shout out their thanks. The one-eyed man wipes his nose, and the one-armed man makes the sign of the Aquila.{/n} "Long live Rogue Trader {name} von Valancius!" {n}The joyous cry is immediately echoed by dozens more voices.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Kalabalığın yüzleri aydınlanıyor. Bazıları hararetle dua etmeye, diğerleri teşekkürlerini haykırmaya başlıyor. Tek gözlü adam burnunu siliyor, tek kollu adam da Çift Başlı Kartal işareti yapıyor.{/n} "Çok yaşa Hür Tacir {name} von Valancius!" {n}Neşeli çığlık, hemen onlarca ses tarafından yankılanıyor.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Los rostros de la muchedumbre se iluminan: algunos empiezan a rezar con fervor, otros expresan a gritos su agradecimiento. El hombre tuerto se limpia la nariz y hace el signo del Aquila.{/n} «¡Larga vida a{mf|l| la} Comerciante Independiente {name} von Valancius!». {n}Un centenar de voces se hace eco inmediatamente de ese grito eufórico.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The faces of the crowd brighten: some begin to pray fervently, others to shout out their thanks. The one-eyed man wipes his nose, and the one-armed man makes the sign of the Aquila.{/n} "Long live Rogue Trader {name} von Valancius!" {n}The joyous cry is immediately echoed by dozens more voices.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Los rostros de la muchedumbre se iluminan: algunos empiezan a rezar con fervor, otros expresan a gritos su agradecimiento. El hombre tuerto se limpia la nariz y hace el signo del Aquila.{/n} «¡Larga vida a{mf|l| la} Comerciante Independiente {name} von Valancius!». {n}Un centenar de voces se hace eco inmediatamente de ese grito eufórico.{/n}

languages.text: {n}人群的脸上顿时有了光彩：有人开始虔诚地祈祷，其余的则高声表达着感谢。独眼男子擦了擦鼻子，独臂男子做了个双头鹰手势。{/n}“行商浪人万岁！{name}·冯·瓦兰修斯万岁！”{n}这声欢呼立刻得到了数十人的响应。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The faces of the crowd brighten: some begin to pray fervently, others to shout out their thanks. The one-eyed man wipes his nose, and the one-armed man makes the sign of the Aquila.{/n} "Long live Rogue Trader {name} von Valancius!" {n}The joyous cry is immediately echoed by dozens more voices.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}人群的脸上顿时有了光彩：有人开始虔诚地祈祷，其余的则高声表达着感谢。独眼男子擦了擦鼻子，独臂男子做了个双头鹰手势。{/n}“行商浪人万岁！{name}·冯·瓦兰修斯万岁！”{n}这声欢呼立刻得到了数十人的响应。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Les visages de la foule s'illuminent : certains commencent à prier avec ferveur, d'autres crient des remerciements. Le borgne s'essuie le nez, tandis que le manchot fait le signe de l'Aquila.{/n} « Longue vie {mf|au libre-marchand|à la libre-marchande} {name} von Valancius ! » {n}Cette exclamation enjouée est immédiatement répétée par des dizaines d'autres voix.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The faces of the crowd brighten: some begin to pray fervently, others to shout out their thanks. The one-eyed man wipes his nose, and the one-armed man makes the sign of the Aquila.{/n} "Long live Rogue Trader {name} von Valancius!" {n}The joyous cry is immediately echoed by dozens more voices.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Les visages de la foule s'illuminent : certains commencent à prier avec ferveur, d'autres crient des remerciements. Le borgne s'essuie le nez, tandis que le manchot fait le signe de l'Aquila.{/n} « Longue vie {mf|au libre-marchand|à la libre-marchande} {name} von Valancius ! » {n}Cette exclamation enjouée est immédiatement répétée par des dizaines d'autres voix.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Die Gesichter der Menge hellen sich auf: Einige beten inbrünstig, andere rufen laut Worte des Dankes. Der einäugige Mann putzt sich die Nase, und der Einarmige macht das Zeichen des Adlers.{/n} "Lang lebe {mf|Freihändler|Freihändlerin} {name} von Valancius!" {n}Der freudige Ruf wird umgehend von Dutzenden weiterer Stimmen wiederholt.{/n}

The one-eyed man wipes his nose, and the one-armed man makes the sign of the Aquila.{/n} "Long live Rogue Trader {name} von Valancius!" {n}The joyous cry is immediately echoed by dozens more voices.{/n}
